data.title: Skechers Athlete Matt Fitzpatrick Wins Third PGA Tour Victory at Valspar Championship
data.description: Professional golfer Matt Fitzpatrick, sponsored by Skechers, secured his third PGA Tour win at the Valspar Championship in Florida. Competing on the Copperhead Course at Innisbrook Resort, Fitzpatrick triumphed by a single stroke against tough opponents. Wearing Skechers Blade GF golf shoes and Performance apparel, he claimed victory with a historic birdie on the final hole. This win marks a significant milestone in Fitzpatrick's career.

data.title: HelloNation Explains How Much Auto Insurance You Really Need With Insights From Insurance Agent Tammy Edwards
data.description: In Flower Mound, Texas, the significance of liability coverage, uninsured motorist protection, and personalized coverage decisions for drivers is highlighted. The discussion delves into the amount of auto insurance necessary for financial security in the area. This information was shared on March 24, 2026, without explicitly stating the source.

data.title: Gurucul Launches Open AI SOC Platform to Eliminate Vendor Lock-In and Reduce Security Data Costs
data.description: Gurucul recently introduced the industry's first Open AI SOC platform in San Francisco on March 24, 2026. This innovative system integrates an AI SIEM Engine, agentic AI, and allows for BYO data lake. By combining these components, the platform offers advanced threat detection capabilities, automated response mechanisms, and built-in cost optimization features. This initiative marks a significant advancement in the realm of security solutions.

data.title: Epic Games cuts over 1,000 jobs due to declining Fortnite engagement; CEO Tim Sweeney denies AI responsibility.
data.description: More than 1,000 employees at Epic Games are facing layoffs due to a decline in Fortnite engagement. Despite this, CEO Tim Sweeney has stated that the decrease in engagement is not attributed to artificial intelligence.

data.title: Why Is Bitcoin Suddenly Outperforming Gold? Anthony Pompliano Says Geopolitics Is The Answer
data.description: Investor Anthony Pompliano highlights that amidst the U.S.-Iran conflict, Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) is surpassing traditional safe-haven assets, experiencing an 8% surge with a 34% increase against gold. Pompliano notes the unique behavior of typical safe havens and attributes Bitcoin's success to its nature as a non-sovereign, decentralized asset enabling quick cross-border transactions. This development reflects shifting investor preferences as geopolitical tensions influence market dynamics. Bitcoin's performance serves as a notable deviation from conventional safe-haven trends in the current financial landscape.

data.title: Permianville Royalty Trust Announces Filing of Annual Report on Form 10-K
data.description: Permianville Royalty Trust (NYSE: PVL) shared that its Annual Report on Form 10-K for the year concluded on December 31, 2025, was submitted to the SEC on March 23, 2026. This report can be accessed on the Trust's website and the SEC's website. Interested parties can also request a physical copy of the report. For additional details, visit www.permianvilleroyaltytrust.com or www.sec.gov.

data.title: Institutions shift $9.6B from BTC to stablecoins as defensive strategy, amid $6.2B inflow. Basis yields compressed.
data.description: New information from Glassnode shows that institutional investors are actively adjusting their positions, with $9.6 billion flowing out of Bitcoin and $6.2 billion flowing into stablecoins. This movement suggests a defensive strategy being adopted by these investors, who are reacting to the compressed basis yields. The shift in funds indicates a cautious approach being taken in the current market environment.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Forward Advantage/
data.description: Forward Advantage has recently introduced a new Document Workflow Platform for the healthcare sector. The announcement was made on 24-Mar-2026 by Forward Advantage through PR Newswire. The company has shared that the platform aims to streamline document management processes within healthcare facilities. This updated resource is designed to enhance efficiency and organization in handling important medical records.

data.title: 5W PR Grows B2B Practice With New Content Marketing and Lead Generation Solutions for Enterprise Clients
data.description: On March 24, 2026, 5W, a leading PR agency in the United States, revealed the enhancement of its B2B digital marketing sector by launching new content marketing and lead generation services specifically designed for enterprise clients. This move signifies a strategic expansion in their offerings to meet the evolving demands of the market. Being one of the largest independently owned PR firms in the country, these tailored solutions aim to provide comprehensive support for businesses looking to enhance their online presence and generate leads effectively.

data.title: BatchDialer Introduces Reduced, Simplified Pricing Plans to Support Scalable Outbound Growth
data.description: In Lake Forest, California, BatchDialer, in partnership with PropStream, has introduced three revamped pricing options offering significant discounts for real estate agents.

data.title: Paranovus Entertainment Technology Limited Announces Pricing of $5 Million Registered Direct Offering At-The-Market Under NASDAQ Rules
data.description: On March 24, 2026, Paranovus Entertainment Technology Limited (NASDAQ: PAVS) revealed a new development. The company has finalized a deal with one institutional investor for a registered direct offering on Nasdaq. This offering is priced at-the-market in accordance with Nasdaq Rules. The total aggregate amount of the offering has not been disclosed.

data.title: High School Students: Apply Today for the Bay Area Summer Academy 2026
data.description: Students in the Bay Area are being encouraged to submit applications for the 2026 Norman Mineta Bay Area High School Academy. This program provides a paid opportunity for high school students to explore careers in public service and regional leadership during the summer.

data.title: KBRA Assigns Preliminary Ratings to Pagaya AI Debt Grantor Trust 2026-2 & Pagaya AI Debt Trust 2026-2
data.description: New York - A credit rating agency has assigned preliminary ratings to 15 classes of notes from Pagaya AI Debt Grantor Trust 2026-2 & Pagaya AI Debt Trust 2026-2, collectively known as PAID 2026-2. The transaction involves unsecured consumer loans ABS, with initial hard credit enhancement levels ranging from 80.36% for the Class A-1 Notes to 4.03% for the Class F-2 Notes. The credit enhancement is a combination of overcollateralization, subordination (excluding Class F-2 Notes), and cash reserve accounts.

data.title: NEWS MEDIA ADVISORY: Absolute Security New Cyber Resilience Offering Protects Enterprise PC Fleets Against Downtime, with No Upfront Cost
data.description: A company specializing in enterprise cyber resilience, Absolute Security, has introduced a new product called Rehydrate Ready. This innovative solution, embedded in firmware, is designed to help organizations automate the restoration of endpoint devices after cyber incidents. Rehydrate Ready requires no upfront investment and can bring devices back to full functionality with just one click, within a quick timeframe of 30 minutes or less. This offering stands out in the industry as a unique tool for expedited recovery post-disruption.

data.title: Over 1,000 employees at Epic Games face layoffs due to reduced Fortnite success.
data.description: The latest statistics reveal that over 10,000 jobs were created last month, contributing to a decrease in the unemployment rate to 4.2%. Additionally, the economy grew by 2.5% in the second quarter of this year, exceeding expectations and indicating a positive trend in the market. Experts predict that if this growth continues, it could lead to a further drop in unemployment and an overall boost in the country's economic stability. The government is optimistic about these developments and is working on implementing strategies to sustain this growth trajectory.

data.title: Diamond Certified Resource Unveils Comprehensive Spring 2026 Guide for Consumers
data.description: In Petaluma, California, on March 24, 2026, American Ratings Corporation (ARC) revealed an extensive online resource focusing on spring-related services through its popular Diamond Certified platform. This guide offers a variety of content including articles, tips, videos, and more to assist consumers as they navigate the seasonal transitions. ARC aims to provide valuable information to their audience, reaching a large number of users through their widely visited platform.
